title: Testing, Debugging, and Quality Evidence · Runtime Lens: Python Coverage Quality
summary: Verify the command-line data tool across pure logic, filesystem boundaries, failures, and changed inputs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python coverage quality increment in a tested data-report release candidate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use coverage, mutation ideas, static analysis, formatting, and review as complementary evidence rather than score chasing.
Reproduce, minimize, hypothesize, inspect state, repair one cause, and rerun a named regression set.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Defend the Python Coverage Quality model
